dialogue_text: the debt is no less, though Helium will never know, for you have saved the last of our line from worse than death.
source_excerpt: "If we make it, my chieftain, the debt of Helium will be a mighty one; greater than she can ever pay you; and should we not make it," she continued, "the debt is no less, though Helium will never know, for you have saved the last of our...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
